title: Spectral Rule
description: Schema for a single Spectral linting rule definition. Rules are the core unit of Spectral rulesets and define how to validate API specifications.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this rule checks and why it matters

message.description: The error message shown when the rule fails. Can use {{error}} and {{description}} template variables.

severity.description: How severe a rule violation is

resolved.description: If false, run the rule against unresolved ($ref-intact) documents

formats.description: Limit this rule to specific specification formats

given.description: JSONPath expression(s) targeting nodes to validate. Can be a string or array of strings.

then.description: The assertion(s) to apply to nodes matched by 'given'

recommended.description: Whether this rule is included in the 'recommended' preset

tags.description: Organizational tags for grouping related rules

RuleThen.description: A single assertion to run against matched nodes

field.description: A specific field to check within each matched node

function.description: The built-in or custom function to call for validation

functionOptions.description: Options passed to the validation function
